message:
Fix: Handle edge cases in command truncation and event mapping

1. CommandBox truncation (commandbox.go):
   - Fixed potential panic when MaxWidth is 1-3 and command is longer
   - If MaxWidth > 3: use ellipsis truncation (existing behavior)
   - If MaxWidth <= 3: truncate without ellipsis to avoid negative slice

2. Watch event mapping (watch.go):
   - Added StatusTimedOut to statusToEventType mapping
   - Execution timeouts now emit "request_executed" events like other
     execution terminal states
   - Previously StatusTimedOut was unmapped and events were silently dropped

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -224,7 +224,7 @@ func statusToEventType(status db.RequestStatus) string {
 		return "request_approved"
 	case db.StatusRejected:
 		return "request_rejected"
-	case db.StatusExecuted, db.StatusExecutionFailed:
+	case db.StatusExecuted, db.StatusExecutionFailed, db.StatusTimedOut:
 		return "request_executed"
 	case db.StatusTimeout:
 		return "request_timeout"
